range.name: MAP_TEAMBUILDTYPE_TO_BATTLETYPE

range.name: BATTLE_TYPES_WITH_HARD_FILTER
range.values: PVE_BATTLE, EVENT_BATTLE, RANKED_BATTLE, CLAN_BATTLE, BRAWL_BATTLE, RATING_BATTLE, TRIAL_BATTLE

range.name: SORT_ORDER

range.name: SORT_ORDER

range.name: IS_EVENT_CURRENCY

range.name: SHIP_LEVELS
range.values: NONE, I, II, III, IV, V, VI, VII, VIII, IX, X, SUPER_SHIP, XII, XIII

range.name: SORT_ORDER
